title: goodyera marginata
intro: Goodyera marginata, also known as the marginated racemose orchid, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Goodyera marginata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Goodyera marginata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine practices in the region.
